current_iteration.baseline_audit_status: v0.28.0 package extracted directly and used as the sole baseline; unchanged files are compared against that ZIP by content and archived modification timestamp.
current_iteration.approval_evidence: User asked to add the omitted licensed photographs and exercise-specific Form Guide content now, to the package just generated, under the standing structure and timestamp requirements.
approved_scope: Add licensed photographs to the existing exercise Form Guide bottom sheet
Add useful exercise-specific Setup, Movement, Common Mistakes, and Tips content
Preserve the v0.28.0 workout-program and backend data-storage behavior
Maintain the existing file and directory structure
Preserve original modification timestamps for unchanged files and use real modification timestamps for changed or new files
Represent unavailable or unmatched guide content honestly rather than fabricating completeness
explicitly_excluded: Changes to v0.28.0 workout-event or connected-preferences storage paths
Claims that remote Wikimedia photos are embedded or available offline
Unverified live-provider, protected-workbook, deployed-cache, or physical-device claims
acceptance_criteria: Exercise guide data loads before the main application
Seventeen reviewed guides contain all required instructional sections
Matched guides show a licensed/public-domain photo with visible attribution
Unmatched guides are labeled as not reviewed for the exact exercise
Existing workout persistence behavior is unchanged
Project audit, JavaScript syntax, guide-contract, regression, and ZIP-integrity checks pass
Unchanged files retain baseline ZIP modification timestamps
current_iteration.rollback_plan: Restore ZEKE v0.28.0 build 2026.07.23.0005; no data migration is required.
